summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil directs readers to her Bloomberg View column about the threat big data poses to health insurance. The post itself contains no substantive argument, serving only as a pointer to external content. She signals her return to regular blogging after a hiatus.
key_points: O'Neil published a column at Bloomberg View about big data and health insurance
The provocative title suggests big data will be used to deny or price people out of health coverage
This is a return-to-blogging announcement post
money_quotes: Big Data Is Coming to Take Your Health Insurance
key_insight: The post title alone signals O'Neil's concern that big data will be weaponized against consumers in the health insurance market.
